---
name: Enhancement
about: Feature improvement, UX polish, or capability extension
title: "[Enhancement] "
labels: ["enhancement", "status:triage"]
---

## Description

What should change and why?

> e.g., Add streaming response indicators in CLI so users know LLM is still generating

## Motivation

What problem does this solve?

> e.g., Users cancel requests thinking they hung, when model is just slow

## Acceptance Criteria

Define "done" for this enhancement.

> e.g., Streaming tokens shown in real-time with a typing indicator; works across all model SKUs

## Priority

- [ ] p0-critical
- [ ] p1-high
- [ ] p2-medium
- [ ] p3-low

## Domain

- [ ] domain:router
- [ ] domain:models
- [ ] domain:cli
- [ ] domain:docs
- [ ] domain:infra
- [ ] domain:security
- [ ] domain:platform

## Agent Context

Paths, APIs, related issues for agent reference.

```
- Related: #
- Files:
- Estimate:
```
